researcher.name: Research Aggregator
researcher.description: Gather user feedback, competitive intel, and market data to inform product decisions.

market-analyst.name: Market Analyst
market-analyst.description: Analyze market trends, competitor landscape, and market sizing to support strategic positioning.

writer.name: Product Writer
writer.description: Write a full PRD from a briefing and research inputs, following the standard template.

story-breaker.name: Story Breaker
story-breaker.description: Break a PRD into estimable user stories with Acceptance Criteria in Given/When/Then format.

prioritizer.name: Backlog Prioritizer
prioritizer.description: Score and rank backlog items using RICE, MoSCoW, and Kano frameworks.

reviewer.name: Consistency Reviewer
reviewer.description: Review cross-document references, naming consistency, TBDs, and end-to-end traceability.

ux-reviewer.name: UX Reviewer
ux-reviewer.description: Evaluate user flows, UX consistency, and accessibility against the product spec.

stakeholder-comm.name: Stakeholder Communicator
stakeholder-comm.description: Produce stakeholder updates, executive summaries, and release notes from finalized product artifacts.
